name: @synoi/oid-resolver
description: Reference implementation of the SynOI OID Resolver protocol — content-addressed lookup, revocation status, and supersession chains for SRAID-stack objects.
author: SynOI Inc. <hello@synoi.systems>

scripts.test: tsx test/resolve.test.ts && tsx test/announce.test.ts && tsx test/revocations.test.ts && tsx test/federation.test.ts && tsx test/api-key-auth.test.ts && tsx test/metering.test.ts && tsx test/license.test.ts
